summary: Show Requisition (Subcontractor Invoice) Contract Detail Item
description: Return a Requisition (Subcontractor Invoice) Contract Detail Item

id.description: ID for a Contract Detail Item

detail_line_item_id.description: ID for a Work Order Contract Detail Line Item or Purchase Order Contract Detail Line Item

work_completed_from_previous_application.description: Work completed from previous application amount

materials_presently_stored.description: Materials presently stored amount. Only present when using amount based accounting.

total_completed_and_stored_to_date.description: Total completed and stored to date amount

total_completed_and_stored_to_date_perce.description: Total completed and stored to date percent

work_completed_retainage_from_previous_a.description: Work completed retainage amount from previous application

work_completed_retainage_retained_this_p.description: Work completed retainage amount retained this period

work_completed_retainage_percent_this_pe.description: Work completed retainage percent this period

materials_stored_retainage_currently_ret.description: Materials stored retainage amount currently retained. Only present when using amount based accounting.

materials_stored_retainage_percent_this_.description: Materials stored retainage percent this period. Only present when using amount based accounting.

work_completed_retainage_released_this_p.description: Work completed retainage amount released this period

materials_stored_retainage_released_this.description: Materials stored retainage amount released this period. Only present when using amount based accounting.

scheduled_quantity.description: Scheduled quantity. Only present when using unit based accounting.

scheduled_unit_price.description: Scheduled unit price. Only present when using unit based accounting.

work_completed_this_period_quantity.description: Work completed this period quantity. Only present when using unit based accounting.

work_completed_from_previous_application.description: Work completed from previous application quantity. Only present when using unit based accounting.

materials_moved.description: Materials automatically moved from previous line item into previous work completed. This will be non-zero only if move_materials_to_previous_work_completed is true on the payment application.
